item.description:
Tempora 0.4.5

  • New — Show today's logged time in the menu bar. Turn it on in Settings › General › Menu bar to keep your running total for the day in view, alongside the timer.
  • New — Choose where a Teams call's title goes. Under Settings › Tracking › Teams call you can put the meeting name in the entry's notes (the default) or its title.
  • Improved — When a call ends and the entry editor opens on its own, Tempora now plays the notification sound so you don't miss it.
  • Improved — Various technical improvements under the hood.

Tempora 0.4.4

  • New — Create a ticket straight from the sidebar. The ➕ menu now has a "New Ticket" action, so you can add a ticket to a project without starting a timer first.
  • New — Tickets are included in JSON export and import. Each project's tickets travel with it, and importing a backup restores them (skipping any that already exist under the same project).
  • Changed — The Settings window has a cleaner layout.
  • Improved — Various technical improvements under the hood.

Tempora 0.4.3

  • Fixed — popovers are more reliable. Some could refuse to open after being used once, and others could be left on screen with no way to dismiss them.
